data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority Assistant Director: Hong Kong Government’s Third Batch of Tokenized Bonds May Be Subscribed to CBDC
data.description: Hui Wai-chi, Assistant Director (External Affairs) of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, disclosed that the Hong Kong SAR government has issued approximately HK$386 billion in bonds denominated in RMB, Hong Kong dollars, euros, and US dollars since 2019 through the Government Sustainable Bond Program and the Infrastructure Bond Program. Two tranches of tokenized green bonds were successfully issued in February 2023 and February 2024, with scales of US$100 million and US$750 million, respectively. The third tranche of tokenized bonds, which the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is assisting the Hong Kong government in issuing, will not only tokenize the asset side but also consider tokenizing the funding side. Given that central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) are the earliest and most mature forms of tokenization in Hong Kong, the funding side of these tokenized bonds may be connected to CBDC subscriptions. (Caixin.com)

data.title: Potential Impact of Federal Reserve Leadership on Bitcoin Prices
data.description: According to PANews, Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz discussed the potential impact of future Federal Reserve leadership on Bitcoin prices during a YouTube interview with Kyle Chasse on Friday. Novogratz suggested that if the successor to Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair adopts a notably dovish stance, it could lead to a significant increase in Bitcoin prices. He emphasized that such a shift in leadership could serve as a major bullish catalyst for Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency markets.

data.title: Shiba Inu ETF News: What Investors Need to Know About SHIB’s Path to Legitimacy
data.description:
"Recent developments regarding the Shiba Inu ETF have generated significant interest in the cryptocurrency market, prompting investors to consider the implications for SHIB’s journey toward gaining widespread recognition and legitimacy as a viable asset. In this article, we will explore the key factors that investors should be aware of, including regulatory hurdles, market trends, and the potential impact of the ETF on Shiba Inu's value and adoption. Understanding these elements will be crucial for those looking to navigate the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency investments, particularly in relation to the growing popularity of meme coins like Shiba Inu."
source: https://blocknews.com/shiba-inu-etf-news-what-investors-need-to-know-about-shibs-path-to-legitimacy/

data.title: Circle Reports Decline in USDC Circulation Amid Recent Activity
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle experienced significant changes in USDC circulation over a seven-day period ending September 18, 2025. During this timeframe, Circle issued approximately 6.1 billion USDC while redeeming around 6.5 billion USDC, resulting in a net decrease of 400 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 73.9 billion tokens, supported by reserves amounting to approximately $74.1 billion. These reserves include around $9 billion in cash and $65.1 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: Zeus Network Launches BitcoinKit to Bridge Bitcoin Into Solana DeFi With Modular Tools and zBTC Integration.
data.description:
Zeus Network has officially launched its innovative BitcoinKit, a comprehensive set of modular tools designed to seamlessly integrate Bitcoin into the Solana decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. This new initiative not only facilitates the transfer and utilization of Bitcoin within Solana but also incorporates zBTC, a unique token that enhances the interoperability between these two prominent blockchain networks. By bridging the gap between Bitcoin and Solana DeFi, Zeus Network aims to empower users with greater flexibility and expanded opportunities in their financial ventures.
source: https://blocknews.com/zeus-network-launches-bitcoinkit-to-bridge-bitcoin-into-solana-defi-with-modular-tools-and-zbtc-integration/

data.title: Euphoria's official X account has been stolen. Please do not click on the related links.
data.description: The official X account of Euphoria, a MegaETH-based crypto derivatives trading app, has been compromised. Hackers have tweeted a phishing link. Currently, control of the account remains in the hands of the hackers. Please do not interact with it.

data.title: Tom Lee: It is healthy to see a pullback in the super cycle, and the macro bull market is not over yet
data.description: “The macro bull market is not over yet, and it’s always very healthy to see a pullback in a super cycle,” Tom Lee, co-founder of Fundstrat and chairman of BitMine, told CNBC.

data.title: Peter Schiff: BTC has been in a long-term invisible bear market, and its growth rate this year lags behind major precious metals
data.description: Economist and cryptocurrency critic Peter Schiff published data on the X platform showing that BTC and ETH's year-to-date gains have lagged behind those of major precious metals, including: platinum, up 74%, silver, up 59%, palladium, up 44%, gold, up 43%, Ethereum, up 20%, and Bitcoin, up 16%. Peter Schiff also pointed out that Bitcoin has been in a long-term "hidden bear market," as its price, measured in gold, is currently 22% below its August 2025 high and 20% below its November 2021 high.

data.title: Euphoria's Official Account Compromised by Hackers
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the official X account of Euphoria, a crypto derivatives trading application based on MegaETH, was hacked on September 27. The account has since been used to post phishing links, and control remains with the hackers. Users are advised to avoid interacting with the compromised account to safeguard their assets.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/30238114755354?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $248 million yesterday, marking the fifth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (September 26th, US Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $248 million. The Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHE) saw the largest daily net inflow, with a net inflow of $17.91 million, bringing ETHE's total net outflow to $4.57 billion. The 21Shares Ethereum ETF (TETH) followed with a net inflow of $8.05 million, bringing ETHE's total net outflow to $22.57 million. The Blackrock ETHA ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $200 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $13.16 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$26.01 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of Ethereum's total market value) reached 5.37%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$13.12 billion.

data.title: Aster's fee revenue surpassed Circle's in the past seven days, with cumulative fee revenue exceeding $100 million.
data.description: According to Defillama data, Aster's fee revenue reached $56.3 million over the past seven days, approximately 2.6 times that of Hyperliquid ($21.75 million). This has now surpassed Circle ($54 million) to temporarily rank second in protocol revenue, behind only Tether ($153.95 million). Furthermore, Aster's cumulative fee revenue has now exceeded $100 million, currently reaching $110.5 million.

data.title: Eric Trump Encourages Buying Amid Market Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Eric Trump, the second son of U.S. President Donald Trump, recently tweeted a suggestion to 'buy the dip.' Eric Trump has previously advised buying during market downturns. On February 4 of this year, he stated that it was the best time to increase holdings in Ethereum (ETH), after which ETH experienced a 40% decline over two months. On August 17, he responded to purchasing $18.6 million worth of Bitcoin and Ethereum, describing it as buying the dip.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Record Concentration in Top Companies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from the trading information platform Kobeissi Letter reveals that the top 10% of U.S. stocks by market capitalization now account for 78% of the total U.S. stock market value, marking a historic high. This figure surpasses the previous record set in the 1930s by 3 percentage points and exceeds the peak during the 2000 internet bubble, which was 74%.In contrast, during the 1980s, the total weight of the top 10% of companies by market capitalization was less than 50%. Additionally, the percentage of market value held by the top 10 stocks in the S&P 500 Index has reached a record 41%, indicating an unprecedented level of market concentration.
